title: CI with coverage gate
matter.js direct adapter
Scale simulation — 10K+ accounts × N devices, distribution modeling
design: GenerateFleet(numAccounts, autoRatio, rng) creates full fleet with FleetStats. GenerateAccountDevices sets AccountID. Deterministic via PCG seed.
acceptance_criteria: 10K accounts (106K devices, 0.2s), 100K accounts (1.06M devices, 1.5s), deterministic reproduction verified, safety audit stats
notes: 1.06M devices generated in 1.5s with zero real hardware. 202K safety-critical devices identified.

title: Doltgres audit activity — row-level migration log
Archive Go code to archive/go/
Conversion fidelity test suite — recipe 변환 로직의 의미 보존 검증 프레임워크

comments.author: junghan
comments.text:
핵심 질문: 변환된 자동화 규칙이 원본과 '같은 의미'라는 것을 어떻게 증명하는가?

현재 테스트는 '파싱 되는가', '크로스 변환 후 재파싱 되는가' 수준.
필요한 것은 '변환 전후 의미가 보존되는가'의 체계적 검증.

3개 레이어:
1. Structural fidelity — Expr 트리 shape 보존 (StructuralEquiv)
2. Semantic fidelity — 값/비교연산자/조합자 의미 보존 (Equiv + ValueMapper)  
3. Behavioral fidelity — 동일 입력에 동일 출력 (시뮬레이션 기반)

구체적 항목:
- [ ] Round-trip test 강화: A→B→A 변환 후 Expr.Equiv 검증
- [ ] Coverage matrix: 5 platform × (5 trigger + 6 condition + 5 action) = 80 조합 중 실제 테스트된 조합 추적
- [ ] Edge case recipe set: 실제 커뮤니티에서 수집한 복잡한 자동화 (nested conditions, 10+ actions, mixed triggers)
- [ ] Safety-critical path: camera/lock/smoke 관련 recipe는 100% Expr 검증 필수
- [ ] Fidelity report: ConversionReport에 Expr equiv 결과 포함 — 'converted'뿐 아니라 'semantically verified' 상태 추가
- [ ] Property-based testing: random Expr 생성 → emit → parse → Equiv 검증 (go fuzzing 또는 rapid)
- [ ] RefMapper: 플랫폼간 attribute 정규화 (dp_1 ↔ state ↔ switch.switch) — Equiv의 마지막 퍼즐

이것이 되면 '우리 변환기를 신뢰할 수 있는 이유'를 수치로 보여줄 수 있다.
140만 계정 마이그레이션에서 recipe 변환 신뢰도가 핵심 KPI.

title: Notification activity (webhook/chat alerts)
Realistic failure simulation — rate limit, latency, partial outage, network partition
Temporal Query handler for real-time progress
Safety class — critical devices (camera/lock) get extra verification and stricter rollback
design: SafetyClass enum (critical/important/normal), CategorySafetyClass() mapping, Device.IsCritical() helper. Critical: camera/lock/smoke/CO/alarm/doorbell. Important: thermostat/garage/valve.
acceptance_criteria: All 15 categories mapped, Device.IsCritical() tested, fleet stats track safety breakdown
notes: ~19% critical, ~5% important, ~76% normal in weighted category distribution

title: NixOS flake.nix dev environment
design: flake.nix with nixos-25.11 pinned: Go, temporal-cli (includes dev server), psql, gopls, golangci-lint, delve
acceptance_criteria: nix develop provides complete environment, temporal server start-dev works
notes: temporal-cli 1.5.1 bundles Server 1.29.1 + UI 2.42.1. No Docker needed for dev.

title: IAIF spec — IoT Automation Interchange Format specification document
Go → Clojure migration — archive Go code, rebuild in Clojure
Test coverage: 48 tests, 98.6% library coverage
design: Mock adapter with 6 error injection points, random device/automation generator with deterministic seeds, Temporal testsuite for workflow+activity tests
acceptance_criteria: 48 tests pass, 98.6% library coverage (mock 98.1%, activities 97.8%, models 100%, workflows 100%)
notes: math/rand/v2 required for IntN/NewPCG. SuccessThreshold <= 0 gets overridden to default.

title: ThingsBoard adapter — Rule Chain export/import
Home Assistant adapter (first real platform)
design: HA YAML parser + emitter 완성. Round-trip 검증. 실제 HA 공식 문서 형식 파싱. Legacy format (platform/service) 호환.
acceptance_criteria: 5 automations parse, round-trip re-parse, cross-convert from ST/Google/Tuya/Homey verified
notes: HA adapter as migration source/target는 별도. 여기서는 converter parser/emitter만.

title: Fan-out concurrent device migration
Account model — devices belong to accounts, migration is per-account
design: Account model: ID/Email/Region/Tier/DevCount. AccountBatchConfig for cohort-level orchestration. AccountBatchResult with per-account tracking + critical failure count.
acceptance_criteria: Account model created, AccountSuccessRate/HasCriticalFailures tested, GenerateAccounts with realistic tier/region distribution
notes: Power-law device distribution: 60% have 1-5, 25% have 5-15, 10% have 15-40, 5% have 40-100 devices

title: Multi-converter framework — parse/emit automation formats across IoT platforms
design: Parser/Emitter interface pattern. Standard type system (5 triggers, 6 conditions, 5 actions). PlatformSupport capability map. CheckCompatibility reports conversion feasibility. Cross-platform round-trip verified.
acceptance_criteria: 4 parsers (HA/ST/Google/Tuya) parse real format, HA emitter round-trips, 4×4 matrix all pass, 112 tests
notes: trigger→condition→action universal pattern across all IoT platforms. Tuya uses entity_type int (1-7), SmartThings uses nested JSON if/then, Google uses YAML starters, HA uses YAML triggers.

title: Expr type system — replace Config map[string]any with structured expression tree
design: Expr AST: Op enum (comparison/combinator/sequence/action), DeviceRef (device_id/attribute/component), Validate, Equiv/EquivWithMapping, StructuralEquiv. SDF combinator-style constructors. Coexists with Config (gradual migration).
acceptance_criteria: Validate catches structural errors. Equiv verifies cross-platform semantic equivalence. StructuralEquiv checks shape. Tuya parser populates Expr. JSON round-trip. 154 tests pass.
notes: Phase 1 complete. Next: RefMapper for attribute normalization, other parsers populate Expr, IAIF JSON Schema spec.

comments.author: junghan
comments.text: SDF 조합자 패턴 적용. Comparator(==,!=,>,<,between,in), Combinator(and,or,not,seq,parallel). DeviceRef 정규화. JSON Schema 직렬화 → IAIF spec.

title: Core framework: models, interfaces, workflows, mock adapter
design: Platform-agnostic core: Device/Automation models, SourcePlatform/TargetPlatform interfaces, DeviceMigrationWorkflow with 2-phase (devices then automations), Saga compensation on every step
acceptance_criteria: go build passes, workflow executes on Temporal dev server, 5/5 mock devices migrated
notes: Go 1.25, Temporal SDK latest, sequential migration (fan-out later)
